solutions.title: Solution (adedalic)
solutions.content:
fun main
()
{
repeat
(
readLine
()!!.
toInt
())
{
val n
=
readLine
()!!.
toInt
()
var
l
=
0
var
r
=
4e5
.
toInt
()
for
(
i
in
1.
.
n
)
{
val pairs
=
readLine
()!!.
split
(
' '
)
val limit
=
pairs
[
0
].
commonSuffixWith
(
pairs
[
1
]).
length
if
(
pairs
[
2
]
==
"0"
)
l
=
maxOf
(
l
,
limit
+
1
)
else
r
=
minOf
(
r
,
limit
)
}
println
(
maxOf
(
0
,
r
-
l
+
1
))
if
(
r
-
l
+
1
>
0
)
println
((
l
..
r
).
joinToString
(
" "
))
}
}
